safaris.title: KENYA IS AWESOME WITH LAKE NAIVASHA
safaris.description: Explore Kenya's finest wildlife parks including Lake Nakuru National Park, Masai Mara Game Reserve, and the scenic Lake Naivasha with a boat ride experience.
highlights: Game drives in Lake Nakuru National Park
Full day game viewing in Masai Mara

itinerary.title: Arrival - Nairobi
itinerary.description: Welcome to Kenya! Transfer to your hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Nairobi - Lake Nakuru National Park
itinerary.description: Drive to Lake Nakuru for afternoon game drive to see flamingos and rhinos.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru - Masai Mara Game Reserve
itinerary.description: Travel to Masai Mara with a Maasai village cultural visit.

itinerary.title: Masai Mara - Full Day Game Drive
itinerary.description: Full day game viewing in search of the Big Five.

itinerary.title: Masai Mara - Lake Naivasha
itinerary.description: Transfer to Lake Naivasha for an afternoon boat ride.

itinerary.title: Lake Naivasha - Nairobi
itinerary.description: Return to Nairobi with a visit to Giraffe Centre.

itinerary.title: Nairobi - Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for your departure flight.

included: Bed and breakfast at Ibis Styles Nairobi
Full board at Sarova Lion Hill Lodge
Full board at Zebra Plains main Mara Camp
Full board at Lake Naivasha Sopa Resort
Park entrance fees for Lake Nakuru
Park entrance fee for 01 day in Mara
01 hour boat ride on Lake Naivasha

travelInfo.clothes: Lightweight clothing for day, warm layers for early mornings. Neutral colors recommended.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals included. Special dietary requirements can be accommodated with advance notice.

safaris.note: Prices are per person sharing. Single supplement available on request. Optional balloon ride available at $520 per adult.

safaris.title: KENYA TANZANIA HIGHLIGHT SAFARI
safaris.description: An epic cross-border safari combining Kenya and Tanzania's premier wildlife destinations including Masai Mara, Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, and Amboseli.
highlights: Amboseli National Park with Mount Kilimanjaro views

itinerary.title: Arrival - Nairobi
itinerary.description: Welcome to Kenya! Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.description: Elephants with Kilimanjaro backdrop.

itinerary.description: Return to Nairobi for departure.

included: Minivan in Kenya, Land Cruiser in Tanzania

travelInfo.clothes: Lightweight clothing, warm layers for early mornings. Neutral colors recommended.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals included. Yellow fever vaccination required for Tanzania.

safaris.note: Proof of yellow fever vaccination is mandatory upon arrival in Tanzania. Upgrade to Landcruiser in Kenya available at $1,195 per car.
